exitPopup.title: Before you go — what's your Google Shopping feed score?
exitPopup.lead: Free AI audit. We grade every product on Title, Description and Product Highlights — the 3 factors that decide your ranking. Most stores lose 30–50% of Shopping traffic to feed issues.

auditBanner.title: What's your Google Shopping feed score?
auditBanner.lead: Get a free AI audit of your product feed and see how much visibility you're losing on Google Shopping. We score every product on 3 factors — Title, Description and Product Highlights — and ship the exact fixes that boost ranking. Most stores lose 30–50% of their Shopping traffic because their feed isn't optimized.
auditBanner.metaLine: Free · 30 seconds · Magic-link access — no password to set
